summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Chef movie recommendation app's proportion-based scoring and franchise deduplication features. All enhanced functionality verified and working correctly.

minor_fixes_applied.issue: Datetime timezone error in calculate_rewatchability_multiplier function
minor_fixes_applied.fix: Added proper timezone handling for naive datetime objects

passed_tests: API Health Check - Chef API responding correctly
User Authentication - Registration and login working with JWT tokens
Trending Movies API - Returns 10 movies with enhanced metadata and franchise info
Movie Discovery API - All vibe parameters working (brain_power, mood, energy, rewatches)
Profile Insights API (Enhanced) - Returns proportion_index, raw_score, franchise_count, standalone_count
Stats Object - Contains total_movies_watched, effective_entries, franchises_watched, standalone_movies
Proportion-Based Scoring - All genres have valid proportion_index values > 0
Franchise Deduplication - Effective entries calculation working (franchises count as 1)
Movie Metadata Caching - TMDB franchise info integration present
get_total_counts() Function - Database aggregation working for genres/actors/directors
calculate_proportion_score() Function - Normalizes preferences by availability
group_movies_by_franchise() Function - Groups movies by franchise/collection
aggregate_franchise_scores() Function - Averages franchise data correctly
Watch History Management - Successfully adds movies with proper metadata
Emergency Recommendations - Comfort movie suggestions working
Movie Details API - Complete movie information with cast/crew data
Genres API - Returns complete genre list
User Profile API - Authenticated user data retrieval

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 18 tests passed including enhanced features
success_percentage.frontend: Not tested - Backend only testing as requested
